speaker: MATT
raw_text: 22. "Hmm. You are young. Not yet spoiled by the strange truths of the world around you. I admire your optimism in the face of the unknown. It may be your salvation or it may be your end. Only time will tell. I'll give you this farmland."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Might I make a few more requests? When last we spoke, we spoke in vague terms. There was some cash talked about, and also a place for my family to make a little bit of money or food. There's a farmhouse nearby our main estate. It's nothing special, a few acres of land. I would love to keep that as well so that we can have a source of food for the winters.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a persuasion check, Mr. Doe-Eyed Young'un.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Blink-blink!

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: Yes, we crossed the ocean. We were on those wooden things that have, like--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The ships?

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, ships! That's it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ank'harel? Bigger than Marquet. Ank'harel?

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: Ank'harel!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (gasps) We're getting closer! Oh my god!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is your boss with you right now? Did he come with you or did he send you?

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm with him, well, he said he was around here somewhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Shut the fuck up! He's here right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: Why, is that bad or good?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, real good. Real good thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: It's a real good thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But will you bring us to him?

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I need your help. We need your help! I'm kind of his messenger, I was supposed to find some--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is your first time being a messenger, is it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I don't mean any offense, here, but I was in the middle of a transaction, if you don't mind, sir?!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We'll take the Tongues potion. How much? Come on, give it to me.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Make an athletics check. And you have advantage on this because you're raging, so you roll twice and take the higher of the two.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So if you wanted to, because of one of the feats you have, you could turn that into a pin if you wanted to.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: One of the feats I have?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's on the bottom.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: Now this is turning into a wrestling match, I like that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Or you could just keep whaling on him.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: I want to take him out. Not kill. He's just having fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's going down in the Whole Foods parking lot!

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: So I'm still hanging on him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you're holding onto him by throat, he slammed you against the wall, he's elbowed you in the stomach twice.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: I'm, again, having fun, superspeed. I'm going to, while holding onto him, crawl up his back and jump over and try to land and try to do the move where I do that and throw him.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, against one of the pillars in the bar, away from the innocent people.
